items.name: map
items.title: Map
items.description: A theme-aware MapLibre map component with built-in controls, markers, and popups.

items.name: map-layers
items.title: Map Layers
items.description: MapLibre native layer components: GeoJSON, Vector, Raster, Cluster, PMTiles, Image, Video, Canvas, Route.

items.name: map-deckgl-core
items.title: deck.gl Core Layers
items.description: High-performance visualization layers: Scatterplot, Arc, Line, Path, Polygon, GeoJSON, Icon, Text, Column, Bitmap, PointCloud, GridCell, SolidPolygon.

items.name: map-deckgl-aggregation
items.title: deck.gl Aggregation Layers
items.description: Data aggregation layers: Heatmap, Hexagon, Grid, Contour, ScreenGrid.

items.name: map-deckgl-geo
items.title: deck.gl Geo Layers
items.description: Geospatial layers: Trips, MVT, Tile, Tile3D, Terrain, H3Hexagon, H3Cluster, GreatCircle, WMS, S2, Geohash, Quadkey.

items.name: map-deckgl-raster
items.title: deck.gl Raster Layers
items.description: Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) visualization with GPU-accelerated rendering.

items.name: map-deckgl-wind
items.title: deck.gl Wind Visualization
items.description: Animated wind particle flow visualization with speed-based color ramps.

items.name: map-control-lidar
items.title: LiDAR Control
items.description: LiDAR point cloud viewer with LAS/LAZ/COPC support and dynamic streaming.
